title: Desire Aroma Wax Melt Oil Burner Warmer White Heart
description: Directions Place a wax melt in the burner. Light the candle to melt the wax and release the aroma. Extinguish the candle when not in use. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Ensure proper ventilation when using in confined spaces. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest essential oils.
